name: openclaw--skills--alicloud-ai-image-qwen-image
description: Generate images with Model Studio DashScope SDK using Qwen Image generation models (qwen-image, qwen-image-plus, qwen-image-max and snapshots). Use when implementing or documenting image.generate requests/responses, mapping prompt/negative_prompt/size/seed/reference_image, or integrating image generation into the video-agent pipeline. Use when this capability is needed.
